# distribution-ship-mechanics

Distribution shipping requires two key unlocks: (1) breaking work into single-cycle minimum steps with clear fallbacks (e.g., when wrapper scripts fail, use raw API), and (2) treating execution verification seriously—delegates don't count without artifacts, measurement must be built into checklists. After 21 cycles of review-loop delays, the pattern emerged that the root issue wasn't shipping mechanics but enforcing measurement gates and rebuilding platform-specific fetchers (HN cron, Reddit UA, X API) that keep data fresh independently of manual pushes.
